title: Jaltomata sanctae-martae
taxonomy: Jaltomata sanctae-martae is classified within the plant family Solanaceae. This family, also known as the nightshade family, comprises various flowering plants that include species of potatoes, tomatoes, and eggplants. The classification of Jaltomata sanctae-martae is further specified within the genus Jaltomata, which is a group of plants native to the Americas. The classification of Jaltomata sanctae-martae provides essential information about its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other plants.

intro: Jaltomata sanctae-martae, also known as the Santa Marta jaltomata, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, Solanaceae.
